title: Create : The Salt
description: A small compatibility mod for create and the salt mod.
body:
Create : The Salt is an addon that add the water evaporation and enhanced food mechanic from the salt mod into create, as see in the picture tab.

 

With this, automation of salt and salted food can be possible.

 

You need 200mb of water in a heated bassin to produce 1 salt (20 percent chance).

 

Salting food can be done by mixing said food with salt in a bassin.

        (this mod only port salted food recipes supported by "the salt" mod as "create" recipes, and don't add new one)

 

- Actually supported : 

*Vanilla food
*Farmer's Delight

 

- Planned support : every other mod supported by the salt mod
 


Both Create and The Salt are needed for this mod to work properly.


Link to : Create mod -> https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create

             : The salt mod -> https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/salt



Known issue : - Any food recipe that use bowl in it give extra enpty bowls when salting using the mixer 
                                      for some reason ? Can't figure why tbh.

                          - Suspicious stew always give the same effect after being salted, no matter what the 
                                      base recipe was, effect that change every time the game is launch. So the 
                                      automation of salting suspicious stews is therefore disabled.
